prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年北京市综合类最低位次分别约 3977→3136→3925→3504→3712 名，整体呈波动走势；2025 年基准位次约 3712 名，近 3                         年（2023–2025）在 3500–3925 区间内震荡，无明显单边趋势；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021 年 52 人、2022 年 50 人、2023 年 28 人、2024 年 49                         人、2025 年 49 人；2026 年计划 43 人，较 2025 年缩减约 12.2%，属明显缩招，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为                                                       985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第 10 名（2021–2026），属全国顶尖高校梯队，C9 联盟成员，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026                                年高考周期声誉文件中未出现该校负面舆情；2025 年声誉评价为偏负面（宿舍通勤问题），2024 年为偏负面（师德师风谣言已澄清）；抖音热度排名第 24                                           位（较热），综合热度约 184 万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平；历史投档异常记录中该校从未出现断档信号，报考心理稳定；第五轮学科评估中 A-                                  及以上学科达 13 个，包括电气工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、机械工程 A+、动力工程及工程热物理 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、数学 A、材料科学与工程 A                                          等，工科实力极为突出，与当前社会热门专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026                                                                                                        年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，与该校王牌专业高度吻合，进一步强化报考吸引力；北京市 2026 年高考考生总数约                             84900 人，较 2025 年 65434 人大幅增加约 29.7%，竞争显著加剧；西安交通大学位于陕西省西安市，在北京属跨省招生；该校在北京的招生计划从 2021 年 52 人逐步调整至 2026 年 43                                   人，招生规模有所收缩；本地无特殊地域偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025 年基准位次约 3712 名，2026 年招生计划缩减约                                                        12.2%（竞争加剧）、北京市考生总数大幅增加约 29.7%（竞争加剧）、学校层次顶尖且优势学科与热门专业高度匹配（吸引力强）、声誉舆情平稳无断档风险。在 ，考虑考生数激增和缩招的双重竞争加剧效应，适度修正后预测最低位次约3339名，波动区间2958–3720名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 3339 名，区间 2958–3720 名。位次在区间下限（2958                                                                                                名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能、计算机、电气、自动化）；位次在区间中部建议以二档工科试验班为主力选择，兼顾学科实力与录取概率；位次接近区间上限（37                        20 名）建议以三档专业保底，同时可尝试二档中位次较友好的经济学类。该校工科整体实力极强，电气、计算机、控制等 A+ 学科专业值得优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive category were approximately 3977 → 3136 → 3925 → 3504 → 3712, showing a fluctuating trend; the 2025 baseline ranking is about 3712, with the last 3 years (2023–2025) oscillating within the 3500–3925 range, with no clear unilateral trend; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing comprehensive category: 52 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 49 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of about 12.2% from 2025, a clear contraction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2021–2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities, a member of the C9 League, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates; no negative public opinion about the university appeared in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation file; the 2025 reputation evaluation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues), and 2024 was slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors clarified); Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.84 million, short video exposure at an upper-middle level; the university has never shown a gap signal in historical admission anomaly records, with stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Electrical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., with extremely prominent engineering strength, highly matching current popular majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's flagship majors, further strengthening application attractiveness; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, markedly intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and is an inter-provincial enrollment in Beijing; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing has gradually adjusted from 52 in 2021 to 43 in 2026, with a shrinking enrollment scale; no special regional preference advantage locally.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the 2025 baseline ranking is about 3712, the 2026 enrollment plan is reduced by about 12.2% (intensified competition), the total number of Beijing candidates has significantly increased by about 29.7% (intensified competition), the university level is top-tier and its advantageous disciplines highly match popular majors (strong attractiveness), and the reputation is stable with no gap risk. Taking into account the dual competition intensification effects of a surge in candidates and enrollment reduction, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3339, with a fluctuation range of 2958–3720.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3339, range 2958–3720. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (2958) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer, Electrical, Automation); those in the middle of the range should prioritize Tier 2 engineering experimental classes as main choices, balancing discipline strength and admission probability; those near the upper bound (3720) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors with friendlier rankings like Economics. The university's overall engineering strength is extremely strong, and A+ disciplines such as Electrical, Computer, and Control are worth prioritizing.
